//: Locked decision Q1 (master doc §6.1) is the TARGET framework (net8.0), enforced per-project via <TargetFramework>. This pins the BUILD SDK floor at 8.0 but rolls forward across majors so a newer installed SDK (e.g. 9.x) can build the net8.0 output. CI pins 8.0.x explicitly via setup-dotnet for reproducibility. Changing the target framework (not this rollForward) is the Tier-0 change — see .agent/AMENDMENT_PROCESS.md §3.
